title: Lessingianthus hasslerianus
taxonomy: Lessingianthus hasslerianus is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the tribe Vernonieae. The genus Lessingianthus is a member of the subfamily Vernonioideae. Lessingianthus hasslerianus is native to Paraguay. The classification of Lessingianthus hasslerianus is an example of a plant with a complex and nuanced taxonomic classification.

intro: Lessingianthus hasslerianus, also known as 'Brazilian Pennywort', is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae, native to the subtropical regions of South America. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The bioactive constituents of Lessingianthus hasslerianus include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
